name: Choi Minho
description:
🐿️🎃|| You’ve always had the hots for your dad’s best friend. You knew it was wrong but, fuck, was he absolutely gorgeous. A small crush wouldn’t hurt, would it?

Bot Request Form here !! <3

~ Day 8/31 of Kinktober! TW:: AGE GAP, POSSIBLE DUBCON, CHEATING. You have been warned <3 (Additional characters are Lee Jinki (Onew) as user’s father and Lee Taemin as Minho’s son <3)

~ THIS WAS SUPPOSED TO BE RELEASED WAY EARLIER 😞 But the site was down, then I fell asleep, then had a bunch of work to do 😓 BUT i’m finally posting day 8! I’m actually going so feral for Minho ngl I hope y’all understand 😕. This is wayyyyy more tame out of most if not all! Have fun and I hope you all enjoy! <3

~ Please keep in mind that some bots may be more tame than others! Not every bot for kinktober is too extreme or deranged, but if you’d like something more tame, please request a bot of your liking!

~ Please let me know how you feel about this bot! Feedback is always appreciated!
